phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tower entrance is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde está la entrada para la torre?
phrases.pronunciation: Dees-KOOL-peh, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah en-TRAH-dah pah-rah lah TOH-rreh?

likely_response.local: Tras el claustro, puerta de hierro a la
likely_response.pronunciation: TRAHS EHL klah-OO-stroh poo-EHR-tah DEH ee-EHR-roh AH LAH
likely_response.translation_en: At the back of the courtyard, right hand.

responses.english: At the back of the courtyard, right hand.
responses.phonetic: TRAHS EHL klah-OO-stroh poo-EHR-tah DEH ee-EHR-roh AH LAH
responses.local: Tras el claustro, puerta de hierro a la

phrases.intent_en: Ask which tower has the best viewpoint
phrases.text_local: ¿Qué torre tiene el mejor mirador disponible?
phrases.pronunciation: ¿Keh TO-rreh teh-NEH el meh-HOR mee-ra-DOR dee-po-NEE-ble?

likely_response.local: La torre derecha tiene la vista superior.
likely_response.pronunciation: LAH TOHR-reh deh-REHTH-ah tee-EH-neh LAH BEE-stah soo-peh-ree-OHR
likely_response.translation_en: The right tower has the superior view.

responses.english: The right tower has the superior view.
responses.phonetic: LAH TOHR-reh deh-REHTH-ah tee-EH-neh LAH BEE-stah soo-peh-ree-OHR
responses.local: La torre derecha tiene la vista superior.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy tower climb tickets
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde compro entradas para subir a la torre?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh KOHM-proh en-TRAH-dahs PAH-rah soo-BEER ah lah TOH-rreh?

likely_response.local: En la taquilla, a la derecha del patio.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah DEHL pah-TEE-oh
likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, to the right of the courtyard.

responses.english: At the ticket office, to the right of the courtyard.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah DEHL pah-TEE-oh
responses.local: En la taquilla, a la derecha del patio.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the university history display is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde se encuentra la muestra de historia universitaria?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh seh en-koo-EHN-trah lah MWEH-strah deh ee-STOH-ree-ah oo-nee-ver-si-TAH-ree-ah?

likely_response.local: En el claustro alto, junto a la escalera.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL klah-OO-stroh AHL-toh HOON-toh AH LAH eh-skah-LEH-rah
likely_response.translation_en: In the west wing, next to the library.

responses.english: In the west wing, next to the library.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL klah-OO-stroh AHL-toh HOON-toh AH LAH eh-skah-LEH-rah
responses.local: En el claustro alto, junto a la escalera.
